CustomField.description: Maximum number of changed rows to display as an inline HTML table in the alert email. If the number of changes exceeds this value, the data is sent as a CSV file attachment instead. Set to 0 to always send changes as a CSV attachment, regardless of the number of rows.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum rows shown as an inline table in the email. If changes exceed this number, a CSV attachment is sent instead. Set to 0 to always use a CSV attachment (never inline table). Max allowed value: 999.
CustomField.label: Max Table Rows
